rationale.root_cause: The response correctly identifies the defect at src/be_vm.c:743 in the FLIP opcode, where arithmetic negation is used instead of bitwise complement.
rationale.local_fix: The suggested change to replace -a->v.i with ~a->v.i at the correct site matches the developer patch.
rationale.global_fix: The response explains the root cause as a copy/paste error between similar opcode blocks and suggests eliminating duplication to prevent such bugs, demonstrating understanding of the underlying issue.
